text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, as I'm walking by the<n>central plaza...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hey, lil' buddy! There's no need to<n>be scared! If
you come out, I'll give<n>ya a big ol' hug!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And I'll give you some dried sardines<n>that will
bless you with great fortune<n>if you can eat them in
one bite!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... We're not making much<n>progress, are
we?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hello there. We're looking for a<n>calico cat with
a red collar. Have you<n>seen one around?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Aw, that's a shame... The thing is,<n>someone who
lives around here<n>stopped by earlier.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
They think their pet cat might have<n>wandered onto
our campus and<n>gotten lost.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, are you sure? Thank you<n>for being so
kind.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We decide to split up to better cover<n>more ground.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Meat is life! Everything's nice and<n>grilled up for
ya, so c'mon out, ya<n>hungry kitty!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Woiya... haiya... Mewity meowsies,<n>show me the
toe bean tracksies!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Eureka! "The lost cat can be found in<n>the east!" To
the east I gooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While the others employ their own<n>tactics to find
the cat, I decide to<n>return to the central plaza.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's you again. Are you well?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Well, I figured the best way to<n>discover where a
cat might be hiding<n>is to become like a cat. ♪
choice_data_list: It's probably somewhere it feels safe.
Maybe it's looking for a fun place to hang?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but of course. The cat isn't used<n>to this
environment, so she's<n>probably feeling terribly
anxious.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Let's search for places that are likely<n>to make a
cat feel safe. We're one<n>step closer to finding her!
♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...Exactly what kind of place would a<n>cat feel safe
in, though?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright falls into deep thought<n>again. I
decide to continue searching<n>on my own,
periodically returning to<n>check on her progress.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Absolutely. For all we know, the cat<n>might be in a
wonderfully playful<n>mood.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
The academy has all types of<n>facilities. It must feel
like an<n>amusement park to the little feline.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
If the academy were an amusement<n>park... Oh! I
just had an idea. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
I should try to remember how I felt<n>the first time
my father took me to his<n>amusement park so I can
really get<n>into the right mindset.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright falls into deep thought<n>again. I
decide to continue searching<n>on my own,
periodically returning to<n>check on her progress.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Well, butter me an' call me a biscuit. I<n>figured one
whiff o' this juicy slab<n>o' meat would send a
hungry kitten<n>scamperin' out here.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe my pawprint dowsing<n>took me in
circles...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's starting to get dark. I think we<n>should head
back to the central plaza.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Oh, hey! Look who it is over there!<n>Howdy, Bright!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Taiki! Shhhh! Look at who's sitting by<n>Bright's
feet!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm. Just where could the little<n>kitty have
gone?

text_block_list.name: Cat
text_block_list.text: Mew! Purr, purr...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We all look, and right at Mejiro<n>Bright's feet is a
calico cat with a red<n>collar, rolling about happily on
its<n>back!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
There's no mistaking it! That's got to<n>be the cat
we've been searching for!<n>Bright seems
completely oblivious to<n>its presence, though...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I know! Let's try to catch her<n>attention with hand
gestures so we<n>don't frighten the lil' kitty!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh my... Is that Fukukitaru and Taiki<n>over there?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: And they're waving at me. Hehe,<n>hello again.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
How strange... They're gesticulating<n>quite
enthusiastically for a simple<n>greeting...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Maybe they're not saying<n>hello but
gesturing something at me?<n>They want me... to
look down?

text_block_list.name: Cat
text_block_list.text: Meooow.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Oh myyy. If it isn't a little kitty. ♪ Good<n>day to you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. And you're a calico. That red<n>collar of yours
really suits you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Huh? A red collar... on a calico cat...<n>Where have I
heard that description<n>before?

text_block_list.name: Cat
text_block_list.text: Stretch...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...Oh my. I just remembered. I've<n>been looking for
you.

text_block_list.name: Cat
text_block_list.text: Step, step, step, step.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I should pick her up so I can bring her<n>back to—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Huh? Where did she go?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Bright! The cat is getting away!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: We gotta chase after her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The three of them dash after the<n>fleeing cat and
thankfully capture it!
